title: CanvasEffects Object
description: Provides access to the settings that control the canvas effects.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: isAmbientOcclusionEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if ambient occlusion is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isAntiAliasingEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if antialiasing is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isEnvironmentDomeEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if the environment dome is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isGroundPlaneEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if the ground plane is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isGroundReflectionEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if ground reflection is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isGroundShadowEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if the ground shadow is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isObjectShadowEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if object shadows is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below.   Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

classType.title: CanvasEffects.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

isAmbientOcclusionEnabled.title: CanvasEffects.isAmbientOcclusionEnabled Property
isAmbientOcclusionEnabled.description: Gets and sets if ambient occlusion is enabled. Setting this property is only valid when the graphics preset is set to "custom" and will fail if it is set to "quality" or "performance". The graphics preset can be determined by using the graphicsPreset property, as shown below. Application.preferences.graphicsPreferences.graphicsPreset

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = canvasEffects_var.isAmbientOcclusionEnabled

# Set the value of the property.
canvasEffects_var.isAmbientOcclusionEnabled = propertyValue
